violations.text: The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of bio-film. Ice machine to be sanitized end of day. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025

The ice machine is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Guidance document provided. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025
The floor in the back storage area has an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Owner went out to buy soap. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2024

Food contact surfaces of ice machine were observed with an accumulation of bio-film. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was disposed of. Ice bags to be purchased until ice machine is sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2024
Establishment is bottling nutrition drinks. PIC made the drinks this morning. Caps were removed. Proper methods reviewed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2024

Various foods packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Proper labeling methods reviewed with PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solution. Owner went out to buy test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2024
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2024
